legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires runtime grid generation, the wordfind highlight, Preview/Reader solve, persistence-after-reload, undo, focus management, or an a11y audit.

mappings.it: TC_01 — Adding a word in Hidden Word makes it appear in the WORDS section
mappings.note: blue grid highlight verified in Reader (deferred)

mappings.reason: Blue-line highlight for an added word (runtime wordfind grid render)

mappings.it: TC_03 — "Show Words" is checked by default and the WORDS section is visible
TC_04 — Unchecking "Show Words" hides the WORDS section
TC_05 — Add Show Me / Add Header / Add Instruction Text are all checked by default

mappings.reason: Correct word selection shows strikethrough + highlight (Preview solve)
Incorrect word selection shows no strikethrough/highlight (Preview solve)

mappings.it: TC_08 — "Shuffle" grid control is present and clickable in Settings
mappings.note: letter re-shuffle render verified in Reader (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_10 — Adding a duplicate word does not create a second entry
TC_11/TC_28 — A blank / spaces-only entry is not added
TC_12/TC_32 — Deleting a word removes its row from the WORDS section

mappings.reason: Added word stays highlighted after grid Shuffle (runtime grid render)

mappings.it: TC_14 — Word length is capped at 13 characters (over-length is truncated)
TC_15 — Adding the same word in different case is treated as one (case-insensitive)

mappings.reason: Word found horizontally/vertically/diagonally (Preview solve, runtime placement)
Undo restores previous add/remove state (undo flow, if available)

mappings.it: TC_18/TC_29 — Hidden Word input blocks spaces (trim/spacing duplicates impossible)

mappings.reason: Focus returns to input after clicking Add (focus management, build-dependent)
Partial selection shows no highlight/strikethrough (Preview solve)
Multi-word comma/space entry adds all unique words (only if supported; input blocks spaces)
Recently added words persist after browser refresh (persistence-after-reload)

mappings.it: TC_24 — Multiple words appear in the order they were added

mappings.reason: Highlight colour meets accessibility contrast standards (a11y audit)
Grid resize does not affect words/highlights (runtime grid render)

mappings.it: TC_27 — Numeric input is rejected by the letters-only pattern
TC_11/TC_28 — A blank / spaces-only entry is not added
TC_18/TC_29 — Hidden Word input blocks spaces (trim/spacing duplicates impossible)

mappings.reason: Selecting all correct words strikes through all in WORDS (Preview solve)

mappings.it: TC_31 — The last remaining word cannot be removed (delete disabled at length 1)
TC_12/TC_32 — Deleting a word removes its row from the WORDS section
TC_33 — A minimum-length (2-char) word can be added
